challenge: Design a studio identity that walks the line between restraint and confidence — nothing decorative, everything deliberate. The brand had to communicate creative authority without resorting to the trends it designed against.
title: Identity as a statement
solution: The answer was to strip back to pure typography and mark-making. A bold geometric F — structural, uncompromising — anchored a monochromatic system where photography and white space do the heavy lifting. No colour. No decoration. Just the work.
